Metadata.title: Yane Zhekov — UE5 Gameplay Systems for Studios & Indies
Metadata.description: Technical game developer for Unreal Engine 5 studios and indie teams. UE5 gameplay systems, modular architecture, AI-assisted production, and honest case studies from active game development.

Positioning.title: Problems I solve on your crew
Positioning.description: Every engagement is scoped to your milestone, team, and pipeline—not a canned kit.
Positioning.summary: I work as a single technical partner: no agency overhead, direct communication, and systems shaped to how your team actually ships. Whether you need a gameplay slice proven out or architecture your team can extend in-editor, the work is tailored to your project.

problems.title: Complex gameplay systems
problems.body: Gameplay Ability System, combat loops, progression, and networked logic in C++—with Blueprint surfaces your team can extend without reopening architecture every sprint.

problems.title: Modular, designer-ready architecture
problems.body: Everything I design aims to be reusable, composable, and approachable in-editor—clear data boundaries and iteration-safe APIs so designers and teammates can tune content without fighting the stack.

problems.title: Immersive player experiences
problems.body: Combat feel, progression beats, and VFX tied to gameplay tags—feedback that sells your fantasy in playtests, not just in documentation.

painPoints: Milestones slip because gameplay architecture wasn't built to scale with content.
Designers wait on engineer time for every tuning pass and curve change.
Combat or progression reads well in docs but feels flat in playtests.
The team needs senior gameplay engineering now—not after six months of hiring.

Differentiation.title: What sets this station apart
Differentiation.description: Not a generalist shop or an agency layer—focused UE5 gameplay engineering with a production mindset shaped by my own title in development.
Differentiation.missionBody: Deliver UE5 gameplay architecture that studios and indie teams can extend, tune in-editor, and feel in playtests—scoped to your milestone, not a template dump.
Differentiation.visionBody: Help teams ship complex mechanics and immersive player moments without drowning in one-off code, communication overhead, or architecture that fights every new feature.

differentiators.title: Deep UE5 gameplay engineering
differentiators.body: C++, Gameplay Ability System, and networked logic—not surface-level Blueprint work. Built for the mechanics your milestone actually needs.

differentiators.title: AI-accelerated production
differentiators.body: AI assists exploration, boilerplate, and iteration across the pipeline—always reviewed and hardened in UE5-native C++ before it touches your project.

differentiators.title: Modular by default
differentiators.body: Reusable, composable, designer-ready architecture is the baseline—not a refactor you pay for later when scope grows.

differentiators.title: Direct solo partnership
differentiators.body: You work with the engineer building the systems. No account managers, no hand-offs, no agency markup on every sprint.

rows.label: Who builds your systems
values: Same UE5 gameplay engineer from scoping to handoff
Skill set may not match UE5 systems work

rows.label: Communication
values: Layers of PM and account contact
Depends on availability and context switching

rows.label: Architecture fit
values: Modular, designer-ready systems for your pipeline
May optimize for speed over long-term reuse

rows.label: Cost efficiency
values: Retainers and overhead built into rates
Cheaper hourly rate can mean more rework

rows.label: Player-facing quality
values: Combat feel and immersion tied to system design

AboutPage.title: About Yane Zhekov
AboutPage.description: Technical game developer focused on Unreal Engine 5 gameplay systems for studios and indie teams—solo operator, direct communication, milestone-scoped work.
AboutPage.bio: I am a solo UE5 gameplay engineer partnering with studios and indie teams that need complex systems shipped without agency overhead. I design for modularity and designer-ready surfaces from the start—not as a late refactor—and I use AI-assisted workflows to move faster while keeping everything hardened in C++ before it lands in your project.
AboutPage.mission: Deliver UE5 gameplay architecture teams can extend, tune in-editor, and feel in playtests—scoped to your milestone, not a template dump.
AboutPage.vision: Help teams ship ambitious mechanics and immersive player moments without brittle architecture or communication layers slowing every sprint.

values.title: Modular first
values.body: Reusable, composable systems are the default—built to survive the next feature, not just the current sprint.

values.title: Designer-ready
values.body: Clear data boundaries and Blueprint-safe APIs so content authors can iterate without unraveling the stack.

values.title: Honest scope
values.body: Milestone-based engagements with direct updates from the engineer doing the work—no oversell, no hand-offs.

AboutPage.nowBody: I am building Wang Cultivator, a UE5 action RPG in active development. A full case study and project breakdown are coming soon—in the meantime I bring the same systems discipline to contract and co-dev work.
AboutPage.ctaBody: Open to studio and indie partnerships—send your milestone and I will reply with an honest scope.
AboutPage.eeatBody: Честни EEAT маркери—без надуени награди или фалшиви client лога. Ето какво можете да проверите днес.
eeatItems: Самостоятелен UE5 gameplay инженер с in-development title (Wang Cultivator)—case study и specs coming soon
Партньорства с milestone обхват и директна комуникация с инженера—без agency посредници
Отворено GitHub портфолио и жива case study вместо заети web-client лога
Прозрачни ценови нива и ЧЗВ—обхват преди ангажимент
takeaways: Фокус върху UE5 gameplay системи за студия и indie екипи—not generalist web или agency работа
Модулна, designer-ready архитектура е стандарт от първия ден
Честен статус: in-development title, project write-ups coming soon, първите partner отзиви са добре дошли

PricingPage.title: Pricing & engagement models
PricingPage.description: Milestone-scoped UE5 gameplay work—clear options, honest scoping, and a CTA on every tier. No hidden retainers or agency markup.
PricingPage.intro: Every engagement starts with an honest fit check. Final numbers depend on your milestone, team size, and systems depth—I quote after scoping, not from a generic rate card.
PricingPage.footerBody: Not sure which tier fits? Send your milestone constraints and I will recommend the smallest scoped path that still de-risks your gameplay goals.
PricingPage.compareNote: Базовите числа са отправна точка—крайните винаги следват scoping, never generic rate card.
takeaways: Discovery call е безплатен—fit и milestone outline преди оферта
Fixed-scope slices побеждават open-ended hourly работа за gameplay системи
Базовите числа са отправна точка—крайните винаги следват scoping

tiers.title: Discovery & scope
tiers.body: 30-minute fit call to map your milestone, pipeline, and where gameplay is stuck—before any commitment.
includes: Honest fit assessment for UE5 systems work

tiers.title: Architecture review
tiers.body: Targeted audit or refactor plan before debt compounds—boundaries, data surfaces, and a prioritized fix path.
addsOverPrev: A written audit of your stack and milestone

tiers.title: Milestone slice
tiers.body: Fixed-scope delivery for one gameplay vertical—combat loop, GAS foundation, progression slice, or similar.
includes: Direct updates from the engineer building it

tiers.title: Co-dev block
tiers.body: Embedded co-development across a sprint block—architecture, implementation, and iteration with your team.
includes: Systems built for your pipeline and content scale
Documentation aligned to handoff or continuation
addsOverPrev: Ongoing embedded co-development across a sprint block
Weekly milestone-focused syncs with your team
Systems scaled to your full content pipeline

Faq.title: Често задавани въпроси при briefing
Faq.description: Пряки отговори за студия и indie екипи, които оценяват UE5 gameplay partner—structured за search, snippets и AI summaries.

items.question: Работите ли със студия или само с indie екипи?
items.answer: И двете. Партньорствам с game studios, които имат нужда от senior UE5 systems capacity без дълъг hiring цикъл, и с indie екипи, които имат нужда от един technical owner за combat, GAS, progression или architecture foundations.

items.question: Как изглежда типичен engagement?
items.answer: Започва с безплатен scope call, след това milestone-scoped slice или co-dev block—combat vertical, GAS foundation, progression pipeline или architecture review. Работите директно с инженера, който build-ва системите.

items.question: Достъпен ли сте за full-time роли?
items.answer: Основният ми модел е milestone-scoped contract и co-dev работа. Ако имате full-time opportunity, изпратете детайли—отговарям честно за fit и timing.

items.question: Как ценообразувате UE5 gameplay работа?
items.answer: След scoping—not от generic rate card. Вижте pricing страницата за engagement models (discovery, milestone slice, co-dev block, architecture review), след което се свържете с milestone детайли за scoped quote.

items.question: Можете ли да покажете shipped client резултати?
items.answer: Още няма third-party shipped titles. In-development UE5 title case study е на път—честна дълбочина, когато има реален материал, не placeholder specs.

items.question: Колко бързо можете да започнете?
items.answer: Зависи от текущия production load по собствения ми title и urgency на вашия milestone. Изпратете constraints и target dates в contact form—отговарям с честен start window, не sales funnel delay.
